summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed open PRs. Two security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; seven useful open PRs are kept independent for normal author/maintainer follow-up; one PR needs maintainer judgment because a hydrated maintainer comment identifies a blocking correctness race.
